name: SuperFly Golf Lounge - Tulsa
address: 110 N Elgin Ave Suite 150, Tulsa, OK 74120
about: SuperFly Golf Lounge in Tulsa is an entertainment venue that pairs golf simulation with a lounge atmosphere. The facility is equipped with TrackMan simulators, allowing guests to play on over 280 courses with high precision. A full bar is available, featuring craft cocktails, beer, and seltzers, making it suitable for both serious golf practice and casual social gatherings. The venue caters to medium to large-sized groups and private events, offering a modern space with both indoor and outdoor areas.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium TrackMan 4 simulators with pinpoint accuracy
Ability to play on over 280 renowned golf courses
Full bar with craft cocktails available in a lounge setting
Data-driven progress tracking with the TrackMan app
Option to compare performance against professional golfers

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service available.
Full bar serving craft cocktails, beer, and seltzers.

simulator_hardware.notes: Equipped with dual Doppler radar technology for highly accurate ball flight tracking.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue offers a full bar with craft cocktails, beer, and seltzers.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A typical game with auto-putting settings takes around 45 minutes to an hour to complete.

faq.question: Is SuperFly Golf Lounge kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the venue does not appear to be specifically designed or marketed for children.
